title: NHB Holdings Services is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: NHB Holdings Services is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
NHB Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Vijayawada. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NHB Holdings Services:
NHB Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHB Holdings Services!
